---
repo-actions: false
---

![](assets/images/mitch-v2.png){.col-6 .pro-pic fig-align="center" width=400}

::: text-center
Welcome to my personal site.

Find me @mitchbeebe on most platforms or shoot me an [email](mailto:beebe.mitch@gmail.com).

Learn more about me [here](/about/me.qmd).
:::

::: {.text-center .fixed-bottom .small}
Powered by [Quarto](https://quarto.org)
:::
